title: 50 Pieces Screen Wash Tablets, 200L Concentrated Screenwash Screenwash Tablets, Windscreen Washer Tablets, Screen Wash Tabs, 1 Tablet Equal to 4 Liters of Windshield Washer.
features: Individually packaged: Each compressed car screenwash is individually packaged and each tablet is the size of a coin for easy storage.
1 piece can be mixed with 4 liters of water, which saves considerably than normal car wiper fluid, (most car wiper fluid tank has a capacity of 4 liters, just put one piece)
This winter screenwash tablets can effectively remove bird droppings, resin, road mud stains, improve glass transparency, protect clear vision and improve driving safety.
It dissolves quickly: screen wash for cars tablets can be quickly dissolved with water when put into water, leaving no residue and will not block the car wiper hose.

screen wash tab can also be used to clean home glass, furniture glass, coffee tables, windows, mirrors, etc.Tip: In winter, you can add some alcohol in moderation to prevent car window washing tablet from freezing.
description: Product Description Product Description 1 car wave concentrated glass foaming tablet mixed with 4 liters of water, and 50 pieces can mix 200 liters of concentrated glass water, which is enough to accommodate for one year. This is very economical and practical. You can also share with your family and friends Strong decontamination It can effectively eliminate all kinds of dirt, bird droppings, resin, etc. And it can protect the friction between the wiper and the glass. Save more money by increasing the life of your glass brushes. Easy to use First add an appropriate amount of water, then put it in the car's wipe liquid tank. It can also be put in the water bottle, then added to the wiper liquid tank. In this way, good and inexpensive car cleaning water can be made. Dissolve quickly After being put in the water, it can be dissolved quickly without leaving residues and will not block the car's wipers tube. Multiple uses Can be used for cleaning car windows, cleaning car windows, floors cleaning and more. This product is suitable for all kinds of glass and ceramic products *It can also be used for cleaning the windows of the house, cleaning cars, cleaning furniture, etc. *Each room is the size of a coin and can be stored in the armrest of the car for instant access. *A total of 50 parts are packed, which is sufficient for more than a year. *Please keep children to avoid accidental ingestion.
